name: 一手史料
subject: history
curriculum_points: Students will be able to extract and record relevant information from a variety of primary sources, demonstrating comprehension of their explicit meaning (HL/SL).
Students will be able to identify the origin, purpose, and content of primary sources as part of source analysis.
